category_sources: source_facts.description identifies vgrep as a user-friendly pager for grep.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides vgrep; source_facts.homepage points to the official vgrep GitHub repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/vrothberg/vgrep, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states user-friendly pager for grep; source_facts.executables lists vgrep as a CLI executable.
